description: Lift-and-shift Contoso's on-premises .NET Framework billing monolith to Azure Container Apps with Azure SQL Managed Instance compatibility tier. Preserve batch windows, file-based integrations, and existing SOAP partner endpoints until partners migrate to REST.
constraints: No breaking change to nightly batch cutoff (02:00 UTC)
Maintain ISO-style audit logs for 7 years in immutable storage
Network path from Container Apps to partner VPN must stay under 80 ms p95
requiredCapabilities: Container Apps jobs for scheduled batch
assumptions: Database size under 2 TB at cutover
Partner SOAP endpoints remain reachable from Azure egress IPs allow-listed today
inlineRequirements: Document rollback: revert DNS to on-prem if migration weekend fails health checks

documents.name: migration-cutover-checklist.txt
documents.content: Fictional cutover checklist: freeze schema T-7d, snapshot DB T-1d, dual-write validation T-12h.

topologyHints: Keep message-driven batch separate from synchronous API revision
Prefer Azure Files premium for legacy flat-file drops during transition
securityBaselineHints: Encrypt backups with customer-managed keys in Key Vault
Disable public blob access for integration file shares
